  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi
  2. AbstractToolResponse

Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.AbstractToolResponse

Packages that use AbstractToolResponse
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message
Provides classes related to web grounding and RAG.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider
Provides the core domain model for Anahata's context management system.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi
Defines the model-agnostic domain model for the tool (function) calling subsystem.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.bad
Provides the domain model for tools that were requested by the model but could not be found.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java
Provides the concrete domain model for tools implemented as Java methods via reflection.
uno.anahata.asi.anthropic
Provides the provider implementation for Anthropic's Claude API.
uno.anahata.asi.gemini
Provides the provider implementation for Google's Gemini API using the official GenAI Java SDK.
uno.anahata.asi.gemini.adapter
Provides adapter classes for converting between the core domain model and the native Gemini API types.
uno.anahata.asi.openai
High-fidelity provider implementation for the OpenAI Responses API (/v1/responses).
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible
Provides a universal, OpenAI-compatible provider implementation for the Anahata ASI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.tool
Provides UI components for rendering tool-related message parts.

    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message that return types with arguments of type AbstractToolResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<AbstractToolResponse<?>>
    AbstractModelMessage.getToolResponses()
    Returns all tool responses associated with the tool calls in this message.

    Description
    abstract int
    AbstractModel.countTokens(AbstractToolResponse<?> toolResponse)
    Counts the number of tokens consumed by the given tool execution response.

    Field
    Description
    private AbstractToolResponse<?>
    ToolResponseAttachmentsPanel.response
    The tool response containing the attachments being rendered.
    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.tool with parameters of type AbstractToolResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ToolResponseAttachmentsPanel.render(AbstractToolResponse<?> response)
    Updates the panel with the given list of attachments.
    private void
    ToolCallPanel.renderArguments(AbstractToolCall<?,?> call, AbstractToolResponse<?> response)
    Renders the parameter arguments using the appropriate renderers.
    private void
    ToolCallPanel.renderResults(AbstractToolResponse<?> response)
    Renders the execution results (output, logs, errors, attachments).
    private void
    ToolCallPanel.updateControls(AbstractToolCall<?,?> call, AbstractToolResponse<?> response)
    Updates the status and action buttons based on tool execution state.
